omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We collect information about your activity on our Services, such as search queries you run, pages you visit, your browser type, your IP address, your location, referred URL, and other log information. We also collect information about your device, such as the type of device, the operating system, the device ID, and the apps you have installed. We may also collect information about your browsing history on other websites, if you have given us your consent. We use this information to provide and improve our Services, to personalize your experience, and to show you relevant ads. We may share this information with our partners, such as advertising partners and analytics providers.
